command: RUST_MIN_STACK=8388608 cargo test --manifest-path stage1/Cargo.toml -p axiomc --lib --features run-native-tests
notes: This manifest records the current full axiomc lib-suite failures after the direct-native default-backend flip. It is a triage gate, not a green-suite substitute.

failures.name: project::tests::property_tests_recover_read_only_artifact_directory
failures.rationale: Repair the default direct-native artifact path behavior or update the assertion to the direct-native artifact contract.

failures.name: tests::async_timeout_returns_without_joining_slow_host_task
failures.rationale: Async host-task timeout semantics need direct-native coverage or an explicit unsupported-feature diagnostic.

failures.name: tests::build_project_accepts_mutable_local_borrow_write_through
failures.rationale: The test exercises supported ownership behavior and should pass under the direct-native default contract.

failures.name: tests::build_project_emits_native_binary_with_capability_intrinsics
failures.rationale: The build assertion should validate native artifacts and generated_rust absence instead of generated-Rust output.

failures.name: tests::build_project_emits_native_binary_with_imported_public_static_globals
failures.rationale: Imported public static global lowering should either work natively or fail with a linked unsupported-feature diagnostic.

failures.name: tests::build_project_emits_native_binary_with_static_globals
failures.rationale: Static global lowering is part of the current direct-native ABI surface and needs full-suite coverage.

failures.name: tests::build_project_folds_static_string_comparisons
failures.rationale: Static string comparison folding needs to align with the direct-native default backend.

failures.name: tests::build_project_preserves_static_source_names_for_recursion_tracking
failures.rationale: Source-name preservation should remain observable without generated-Rust artifacts.

failures.name: tests::build_project_runs_try_operator
failures.rationale: The try operator needs either direct-native lowering or an explicit ignored blocker until that lowering lands.

failures.name: tests::build_project_scopes_fs_read_to_manifest_root
failures.rationale: Filesystem capability assertions need to validate direct-native host-shim behavior instead of generated runtime output.

failures.name: tests::build_project_scopes_fs_write_to_manifest_root_without_read_capability
failures.rationale: Filesystem write capability assertions need direct-native host-shim expectations.

failures.name: tests::check_project_accepts_dynamic_stdlib_network_port_with_unrestricted_net
failures.rationale: Dynamic stdlib network port checking needs to match the direct-native capability policy.

failures.name: tests::check_project_accepts_dynamic_stdlib_peer_network_port_with_unrestricted_net
failures.rationale: Dynamic peer network port checking needs to match the direct-native capability policy.

failures.name: tests::checked_in_proof_workload_examples_build_run_and_test
failures.rationale: Proof workload examples should be split so runner-only host, network, or wasm prerequisites cannot hide direct-native regressions.

failures.name: tests::env_allowlist_scopes_generated_env_get
failures.rationale: Environment allowlist tests still name generated runtime behavior and need direct-native capability-shim assertions.

failures.name: tests::generated_runtime_audits_failed_network_intrinsic_paths
failures.rationale: Audit assertions need to move from generated runtime paths to direct-native host-shim evidence.

failures.name: tests::generated_runtime_audits_write_and_http_host_intrinsics
failures.rationale: Write and HTTP audit assertions need direct-native evidence contracts.

failures.name: tests::generated_runtime_emits_optional_host_audit_jsonl_without_secret_values
failures.rationale: Host audit JSONL coverage must be re-expressed for direct-native output.

failures.name: tests::legacy_env_bool_still_checks_with_deprecation_warning
failures.rationale: Legacy env compatibility should be checked without relying on generated-Rust backend behavior.

failures.name: tests::run_project_executes_defer_on_return_panic_and_nested_scope
failures.rationale: Defer-on-panic behavior needs direct-native lowering or a linked ignored blocker.

failures.name: tests::run_project_forwards_cli_args_to_stdlib_cli
failures.rationale: Run-command CLI argument forwarding needs direct-native runtime coverage.

failures.name: tests::run_project_tests_reports_assertion_failure_details
failures.rationale: Test-command failure diagnostics should stay stable under the direct-native default backend.

failures.name: tests::run_project_tests_reports_std_testing_helper_failure_details
failures.rationale: Std testing helper diagnostics need direct-native test-runner coverage.

failures.name: tests::stage1_async_runtime_single_worker_drains_nested_join_and_timeout
failures.rationale: Async runtime join and timeout behavior needs direct-native runtime coverage.

failures.name: tests::stage1_async_runtime_uses_configured_scheduler_and_timer_wheel
failures.rationale: Configured scheduler and timer-wheel behavior needs direct-native runtime coverage.

failures.name: tests::stage1_async_timeout_uses_real_elapsed_timer_and_returns_none
failures.rationale: Elapsed timer behavior needs direct-native runtime coverage or an explicit unsupported diagnostic.

failures.name: tests::stage1_numeric_overflow_policy_checks_signed_debug_and_wraps_release
failures.rationale: Numeric overflow policy must be proven under direct-native debug and release behavior.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_imports_synthetic_stdlib_fs_write_helpers
failures.rationale: Synthetic stdlib fs-write helper imports need direct-native capability-shim expectations.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_imports_synthetic_stdlib_net_module
failures.rationale: Synthetic stdlib net imports need direct-native capability-shim expectations.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_imports_synthetic_stdlib_net_tcp_module
failures.rationale: Synthetic stdlib net TCP imports need direct-native capability-shim expectations.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_imports_synthetic_stdlib_net_udp_module
failures.rationale: Synthetic stdlib net UDP imports need direct-native capability-shim expectations.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_imports_synthetic_stdlib_serdes_module
failures.rationale: Synthetic stdlib serdes imports need direct-native artifact and output expectations.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_reads_lines_from_stdlib_io_module
failures.rationale: Stdlib IO line-reading behavior needs direct-native runtime coverage.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_reads_stdin_to_string_from_stdlib_io_module
failures.rationale: Stdlib IO read-to-string behavior needs direct-native runtime coverage.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_rejects_stdlib_env_without_env_capability
failures.rationale: Env denial diagnostics need to match direct-native capability-shim behavior.

failures.name: tests::stage1_project_supports_async_runtime_surface
failures.rationale: The async runtime surface needs direct-native coverage or explicit unsupported diagnostics.

failures.name: tests::stage1_runtime_reports_structured_error_for_slice_failures
failures.rationale: Structured slice errors need direct-native runtime diagnostics.

failures.name: tests::stage1_runtime_reports_structured_slice_error_in_debug_and_release
failures.rationale: Structured slice errors must be validated in direct-native debug and release modes.

failures.name: tests::stage1_stdlib_http_routed_service_rejects_non_loopback_bind
failures.rationale: HTTP service bind tests need runner policy separation so shell-only environments do not produce false reds.

failures.name: tests::stage1_stdlib_http_service_rejects_non_loopback_bind
failures.rationale: HTTP service bind tests need runner policy separation so shell-only environments do not produce false reds.

resolutionTracking.summary: Integration of the open Rust-exit stack onto main resolves 20/40 rows (addressed_by_open_stack, incl. fs_write_helpers via the completed #1268 fs-write scoping); PRs #1271/#1272/#1273 resolve 4 more (fixed_pending_merge: read-only artifact contract, structured assertion traps, defer). expectedFailureCount stays 40 until these PRs merge to main.
